replacement: io and os packages (io.ReadAll, os.ReadFile, os.WriteFile, etc.)
reason: Package io/ioutil is deprecated since Go 1.16; functions moved to io and os packages
strings.Title is deprecated; use golang.org/x/text/cases for proper Unicode title casing
httputil.NewClientConn is deprecated; use http.Client with http.Transport
Package crypto/dsa is deprecated; DSA is weak and should not be used; use ECDSA or Ed25519
Direct use of syscall package is frozen; use golang.org/x/sys for new syscall wrappers
ast.Object is deprecated; use the go/types package for proper type information

replacement: (automatic seeding since Go 1.20, or use rand.New(rand.NewSource(seed)))
reason: math/rand.Seed is deprecated since Go 1.20; the global random source is automatically seeded

replacement: errors.Is(err, fs.ErrPermission) / errors.Is(err, fs.ErrExist) / errors.Is(err, fs.ErrNotExist)
reason: os.IsPermission/IsExist/IsNotExist don't unwrap errors; use errors.Is with fs sentinel errors
math/rand.Read is deprecated since Go 1.20; use crypto/rand.Read for security-sensitive random bytes

replacement: (no direct replacement; these error vars are deprecated)
reason: These error variables in httputil are deprecated along with the persistent connection API
ioutil.ReadAll is deprecated; use io.ReadAll instead
ioutil.ReadFile is deprecated; use os.ReadFile instead
